summary: Admin authentication bug fix verified. All 10 backend API tests pass. Frontend login flow works correctly with both email and username. Dashboard protection and error handling work as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.js correctly posts to /api/admin/auth/login with username+password
Token is stored in localStorage as 'ceibaa_admin_token' - VERIFIED
AdminDashboard.js auth check at line 30 correctly redirects to /admin when no token
Backend admin_auth_routes.py supports both email and username login at line 50-64
SHA256 password hashing is used at line 79
Admin sessions are stored in MongoDB with 24-hour expiry at line 97-105
seed_data_creation: Super admin user already exists in MongoDB with hashed password
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin authentication is fully working. Key tests: POST /api/admin/auth/login with email or username returns token, wrong password returns 401, verify endpoint validates tokens, logout invalidates sessions. Frontend stores token in localStorage and dashboard redirects to /admin when no token.

frontend_ui_tests.admin_login_page_renders: PASS - Form with username and password fields
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_redirect_no_token: PASS - Redirects to /admin when no token

original_issues: Super admin user was never created in MongoDB
AdminDashboard.js had hardcoded check 'token !== admin_authenticated' that rejected real API tokens
fixes_verified: Super admin user exists in DB with hashed password
AdminDashboard.js now only checks if token exists, not for specific value
Login flow correctly stores API token and redirects to dashboard
